competitors.content: {"results": [{"title": "司印云打印管理平台 - 博瑞凯德", "content": "博瑞凯德的司印云打印管理平台是一款跨平台、跨打印机品牌型号的云打印解决方案，支持Windows、银河麒麟等操作系统。核心功能包括万能驱动、国产系统适配、云与融合部署、内容安全监控、加密与防伪打印、云认证与移动打印等。适配超90%打印机品牌，与华为云等深度合作，2025年获评江苏省'专精特新企业'。国内市场占有率约10%以上。", "url": "https://baike.baidu.com/item/%E5%8D%9A%E7%91%9E%E5%87%AF%E5%BE%B7/5251598"}, {"title": "云打印管理市场规模预测2034", "content": "全球云印刷管理市场2024年价值55.4亿美元，预计从2025年的60.7亿美元增长到2032年的128.6亿美元，复合年增长率11.3%。主要参与者包括佳能、富士、理光、柯尼卡美能达、施乐、HP和PaperCut等。市场驱动力包括AI、移动打印和物联网集成，以及对可持续性和成本优化的关注。", "url": "https://www.fortunebusinessinsights.com/zh/cloud-print-management-market-112117"}, {"title": "企业打印管理软件选择指南2025", "content": "2025年主流打印管理软件包括：PaperCut MF/NG（精细化成本分摊与安全打印释放）、HP JetAdvantage（惠普设备深度集成）、Printix（云原生打印管理）、Ping32（打印行为安全管控与内容审计）、安企神（打印权限精细化控制、动态水印、敏感词拦截）。企业关注点从'能不能打'转向'怎么管好打印'，包括成本控制、合规审计和权限管理。", "url": "https://baijiahao.baidu.com/s?id=1852876253155290098"}, {"title": "PaperCut打印管理解决方案", "content": "PaperCut是全球领先的打印管理软件，服务超过1亿最终用户，覆盖195+国家和70000个机构。支持任何品牌、任何平台（Windows、Linux、Mac、Chro

features.content: {"results":[{"title":"Enterprise Print Management Software: Selection & Strategy - Cost, Security & Compliance (2025)","content":"Enterprise print management software helps control costs and enhance security. Key players include PaperCut MF/NG (known for refined cost allocation and secure release printing), HP JetAdvantage (deep HP hardware integration), Printix (cloud-native for remote work), and Lansweeper (IT asset visibility). Modern features span cost tracking, user authentication, print quotas, watermarking, audit logging, and policy enforcement. Best practices include centralized management, role-based access control, and integration with broader DLP (Data Loss Prevention) frameworks.","url":"https://baijiahao.baidu.com/s?id=1852876253155290098"},{"title":"2025 Print Management Software Selection Guide","content":"Comprehensive comparison of print management solutions for 2025.
